description: You are a postsecondary Area Studies professor preparing a lecture on geographic content differences. Configure Tor Browser to consistently exit through Germany ({de}) by setting ExitNodes to {de} and StrictNodes to 1 in the configuration. Save the verification text from check.torproject.org to /home/ga/Documents/exit_verification.txt. Create a structured report at /home/ga/Documents/tor_exit_config_report.txt including the following fields: Country (de), ExitNodes ({de}), StrictNodes (1), Tor Verified status, and the Exit IP address.
